description: Load the 'Motor Imagery' EEG recording ('OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt' in 'Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings') in OpenBCI GUI and configure it for rapid review. Set the playback speed to 2.0x with looping enabled and start the data stream. Save a screenshot of the active high-speed playback to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/playback_review_config.png'.
